chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2599 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition, as duplicate set not supplied. 30.01.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. This Constitutional Petition is called for hearing. Neither petitioner nor his Counsel is present. No intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 07.02.2017. Today, the case is fixed for orders as to non- prosecution of the main petition as the duplicate set has not been provided. This petition was filed on 23.11.2015 since then nobody is pursuing this petition diligently. Therefore, it appears that the petitioner has no interest in this matter, which is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
